name: G-Lo
description:
Since there aren't a lot of bots of this one character, I've decided to give it a shot and make this one as accurate as I could while taking slight creative liberties, as there's not a lot of info on her.

  • Taking place after episode 6, she's on her own now. She's still looking to work as another hero's sidekick after Bicep fired her and retired.

  • Apart from studying at college, she also works a part-time job at a convenience store.

  • The starting message was originally meant to be VillainPOV, but I decided to make it more open for you to be whoever or whatever you wanted to be.

  • She tastes like pineapple.

  • Now I'm really starting to think G-Lo is kinda underrated. And quite hot too.

  • Be nice to her.

  • I can't believe I forgot to add the second starting message. This time, you've recruited her as a sidekick, and she'll be working close to you as a new pseudo-member of P.E.A.C.E.

If there's anything off in any way, shape or form, feel free to point it out in the comments and I'll see what I can do to fix it.

I still keep that small charm of her I found on the ground a couple of years ago. I have it beside the pink-haired girl one (you know who I'm referring to).

Edit: what the BEEP do you mean Season 1 - Part 2?! At that pace, the series will be over when I turn 80!!! I mean, I'm excited, but... don't tell me it'll be another 6 episodes of 10 minutes each...
creator: Val0302
